name: Applesauce Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Combine oil, applesauce, and cocoa in a bowl. Stir until well mixed.
3. Add sugar and vanilla; stir until dissolved.
4. In another bowl, mix together flour, baking powder, and baking soda.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients into the wet mixture and stir until just combined.
6. Pour batter into a greased 9-inch square pan lined with wax paper or sprayed with cooking spray.
7. Sprinkle chopped nuts on top.
8. Bake for 20 to 30 minutes, or until set but edges are not dried out (a toothpick inserted will come out clean).
9. Cut into 16 squares or more.
